appraisal_events.evidence: « Mais j'espère bien que non ! ... il est assommant, bête et mal élevé. » ... « Et il ne fut plus question de Swann chez les M. Verdurin. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme Verdurin denounces Swann and effectively bans him from the conversational and social space of her salon; Cottard’s submissive reaction ratifies the snub within the group.

status_effects.explanation: Locally excluded from the Verdurin circle, which becomes an obstacle to his meetings with Odette.
